steps.title: Solve
steps.content: Divide both sides by $c^7$: $c^2 = 64$. Take the positive root (since $c \gt  1$): $c = 8$.

steps.title: Answer
steps.content: 8 is correct. Since the base of an exponential function is positive and the problem states $c \gt 1$, use the positive square root rather than $-8$.
